title: grammitis subdichotoma
intro: Grammitis subdichotoma, also known as the dichotomous polypody fern, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Grammitis subdichotoma are said to include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve drying and powdering the leaves, which can be used in teas, infusions, or capsules.
